categories.title: Threat Intelligence
categories.description: Daily roundup of active campaigns, IOCs, and TTPs from open-source and partner feeds — distilled to what your team needs to act on.

categories.title: 06:00 Daily Brief
categories.description: One email. Five minutes. Read with your evening coffee — be ahead of tomorrow. Plain text. No tracking pixels. No marketing.

categories.title: Defensive Playbooks
categories.description: Weekly deep-dives on detection engineering, incident response, and hardening guides — written for practitioners, by practitioners.

categories.title: Breach Post-Mortems
categories.description: When something breaks, we tell you why — with timeline, attack chain, and the lessons your security program can apply tomorrow.

categories.title: Vendor & CVE Watch
categories.description: Track patches and advisories from major vendors. Critical CVEs flagged with exploitability context — not just CVSS scores.

categories.title: Career & Community
categories.description: Curated job board, conference signal-boost, and analyst notes from the field. The defender community, in one place.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-48172: LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin contains privilege escalation vulnerability that is exposed via the user-end cPanel plugin, which can be abused by any cPanel user account to execute arbitrary scripts with root privileges.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-9082: Drupal Core actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.

briefings.title: CVE-2025-34291: Langflow Langflow actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Langflow contains an origin validation error vulnerability in which an overly permissive CORS configuration combined with a refresh token cookie configured as SameSite=None allows a malicious webpage to perform…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-42773 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.3)
briefings.excerpt: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in eMagicOne eMagicOne Store Manager allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects eMagicOne Store Manager: from n/a through 1.3.2.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-42774 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.3)
briefings.excerpt: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Crocoblock JetEngine allows SQL Injection. This issue affects JetEngine: from n/a through 3.8.8.1.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-45216 — HIGH (CVSS 8.8)
briefings.excerpt: Incorrect Privilege Assignment vulnerability in StoreApps Smart Manager allows Privilege Escalation. This issue affects Smart Manager: from n/a through 8.85.0.
